data_deps.name: climax-era5
data_deps.description: ERA5 5.625deg from WeatherBench2 zarr, sharded npz; ClimaX 5.625deg checkpoint (best-effort).

install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y --no-install-recommends wget git curl && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install timm==0.9.16 scipy torchdata pytorch-lightning==2.1.4 jsonargparse[omegaconf] torchvision xarray gcsfs zarr
